case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. LARWENCE LEW et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEW, LARWENCE DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-17-2014

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-04-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUL-14-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEW, LARWENCE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEW, LARWENCE $6,382.75 PRINCIPAL, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,662.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15180019)
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 15180019) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-04-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $280.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 15180019) AS TO DEFENDANT LEW, LARWENCE
